meta.prompt: 显示服务功能开关状态
evalHints: enabled, logging, alerting, autoScale are 0/1 integer fields with boolean semantics — must render as enabled/disabled or on/off, not as 0/1 numbers
must not display 0/1 as raw numbers without visual boolean interpretation
toggle state should be visually clear (e.g. badge, icon, or text label)
all services should be visible in the output
